1080201.name: Brainwave Focus
1080201.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, lose 15 SP.
Gain (Gloom Res / 3) [Enhancement] next turn.

1080221.name: Tenacity
1080221.desc: 1 ally with the least SP deals +10% Blunt damage.
